definitions.text: sette fram mat eller drikke og be noen forsyne seg
definitions.translation: to serve food or drink and ask someone to help themselves

examples.no: han byr fram et fat med wienerbrød
examples.en: he offers up a platter of Danish pastries

examples.no: bygda har unike friluftsområder å by fram til turister
examples.en: the village has unique outdoor areas to offer tourists

examples.no: varene ble budt fram for salg
examples.en: the goods were offered for sale
